chiSiamo.heroSubtitle: AYROMEX S.R.L. is a European AI Automation Agency based in Puglia with legal headquarters in Bucharest. Our mission is simple: eliminate manual work from Italian SMEs through AI systems that actually work.
chiSiamo.missionDesc: Too many small and medium Italian businesses lose clients, revenue and time to manual processes that can be automated. We solve this problem by building concrete systems, not PowerPoint presentations.
chiSiamo.step1d: We analyze your business, your processes and your goals. Free, no commitment.
chiSiamo.step2d: We draw the system tailored to you. No standard solutions, everything custom.
chiSiamo.step3d: We develop and test. You see every step, no black boxes.
chiSiamo.step4d: The system is live. We train your team in less than 2 hours.
chiSiamo.step5d: We are operational 24/7 for support. The system evolves with your business.
chiSiamo.value1d: We measure everything. If it doesn't show in revenue or time saved, we don't do it.
chiSiamo.value2d: We don't sell documents. We deliver active systems that work from day one.
chiSiamo.value3d: You always know what we're building, why, and how much it costs. No surprises.
chiSiamo.value4d: We build for scalability. The systems we create grow with your company.
chiSiamo.ctaDesc: Tell us about your business. Within 72 hours we'll tell you what we can automate.

journal.heroSubtitle: Case studies, market analysis and insights on AI and automation for Italian SMEs. No technical jargon, just what you need to know.
journal.a1title: How a small business stopped losing customers over the phone
journal.a1hook: Marco, owner of an aesthetic center in Bari, was losing 8-10 potential customers every day. Not his fault — he simply couldn't answer the phone while performing treatments.
journal.a1story:
It was the classic small Italian business problem: too busy working to respond to customers who want to book.

Every missed call was an appointment going to the competition. Marco knew it, but didn't have time to be on the phone 24/7 nor the budget to hire a receptionist.

We implemented AI Secretary in 48 hours. From that moment, every WhatsApp message receives a response within 30 seconds, at any hour. The AI books appointments, manages cancellations, and sends reminders the day before.

Marco now only handles requests that truly require his presence. Everything else is automatic.
journal.a1result: Zero customers lost due to missed responses. +34% appointments booked in the first month. 3 hours saved every day.
journal.a1cta: Want the same result for your business?
journal.a2title: The system that reactivates dormant customers at ADM dealers
journal.a2hook: 60% of registered players at an ADM dealer don't return after the third month. It's not disinterest — it's forgetfulness. And forgetfulness is revenue that evaporates.
journal.a2story:
ADM dealers invest heavily to acquire new customers. Then they lose them in silence, without even knowing when they left.

The problem is simple: no one talks to those customers after the first registration. No follow-up, no personalized promotions, no reason to return.

AyroHub automatically identifies who hasn't returned in the last 30, 60 or 90 days. It sends a personalized message via WhatsApp with a relevant offer, at the right time, with the right tone.

Not a generic SMS. A message that feels handwritten, that reminds the customer why they loved that place.
journal.a2result: 28% reactivation rate in the first 30 days of activation. Positive ROI from the second week.
journal.a3title: Why in 2026 every Italian SME needs an AI system
journal.a3hook: Your competitor smaller than you is already using AI. Not to look good on LinkedIn — to serve twice the customers with the same team. And you're losing ground every day.
journal.a3story:
Let's talk concrete data. SMEs that integrated AI automations during 2024-2025 have on average:

— Reduced operational costs by 30-40% in repetitive processes
— Increased customer management capacity by 200-300%
— Nearly eliminated human errors in document workflows

We're not talking about large companies with million-dollar budgets. We're talking about hairdressers, agencies, workshops, medical practices.

The technological barrier has collapsed. What cost €50,000 three years ago today costs less than €500/month. And works better.

The question is no longer 'can I afford it'. The question is 'can I afford not to'.
journal.a3result: It's not a technology question. It's a question of competitive survival in the market.
journal.a3cta: Discover what we can automate in your company
journal.a4title: Automating doesn't mean firing — it means growing
journal.a4hook: The question almost every new client asks us, even before asking about price: 'Do I have to fire someone?' The answer is always no. Here's why.
journal.a4story:
The fear is understandable. AI is scary because it seems to 'steal' jobs. But what we've seen in every project we've followed tells a different story.

When you automate repetitive tasks — reply emails, reminders, reports, bookings — your team is freed up. They don't become jobless. They finally do the work you pay them for.

The receptionist stops answering the same question about opening hours for the hundredth time and starts handling relationships with the most important clients.

The sales rep stops entering data into the CRM and starts closing contracts.

The admin stops copy-pasting between Excel sheets and starts doing strategic analysis.

The staff doesn't disappear — they level up. And the company grows without having to hire for every operational peak.
journal.a4result: More revenue with the same people. Not fewer people with the same revenue. The difference is everything.
